capabilities.name: Long-task finish line
capabilities.user_visible_contract: Long work has observable finish conditions, only required open items, and evidence for every completed condition.
capabilities.runtime_evidence_required: A pending long task must survive a Hook round trip and become delivered only after the recheck.
capabilities.live_evidence_required: A real long Codex task stops at its accepted finish line without adding unrelated work.

capabilities.name: Attention restoration
capabilities.user_visible_contract: Startup, resume, clear, and compact restore only the current long-task goal, finish conditions, open items, and next action.
capabilities.runtime_evidence_required: Both runtime adapters inject the same minimal state shape.
capabilities.live_evidence_required: A resumed or compacted Codex task recovers its next action without treating old state as permission.

capabilities.name: Real user message reconsideration
capabilities.user_visible_contract: Every real user message is reconsidered as continuation, correction, replacement, or unrelated work; an internal delivery continuation is skipped.
capabilities.runtime_evidence_required: Both adapters inject the reminder for real prompts and stay silent for the internal marker.
capabilities.live_evidence_required: A mid-task correction changes only the requested part and then resumes unaffected work.

capabilities.name: Mechanical tool boundaries
capabilities.user_visible_contract: Tool hooks do not guess intent from Shell text and do not block ordinary reading commands.
capabilities.runtime_evidence_required: Common read commands and composed reads produce no permission decision or goal reminder.
capabilities.live_evidence_required: A real Codex task runs cat, test -e, a quoted alternation search, and a read pipeline without false blocking.

capabilities.name: Single Codex delegation backend
capabilities.user_visible_contract: Codex delegates only through the vendored Dynamic Workflow runner while Claude keeps native Workflow.
capabilities.runtime_evidence_required: Native Codex delegation is denied and the vendored runner command is not denied.
capabilities.live_evidence_required: A delegated Codex canary shows one execution engine.

capabilities.name: One long-task delivery recheck
capabilities.user_visible_contract: A finished or blocked long task gets one same-model delivery recheck; a short reply is delivered immediately.
capabilities.runtime_evidence_required: Pending becomes delivered on the second Stop and no-state Stop stays silent.
capabilities.live_evidence_required: A real long-task final is rechecked once while a direct one-sentence question is not regenerated.

capabilities.name: Plain direct reporting
capabilities.user_visible_contract: Replies default to simple natural language without hiding decisions, risks, evidence boundaries, or remaining work.
capabilities.runtime_evidence_required: Resident rules and the long-task Stop prompt carry the same delivery principle without a style scorer.
capabilities.live_evidence_required: A real Codex report is understandable without session context and does not dump internal mechanics.
